# Release vX.Y.Z

This file is a human reference for the draft body generated by `scripts/release-body.ps1`.

The release workflow writes the actual body to `artifacts/release-notes.md` and passes that file to GitHub Releases. Treat the script output as the source of truth.

## Highlights

- Replace these placeholders with short user-facing changes before publishing the draft release.
- Keep release highlights concise; link to `docs/CHANGELOG.md` for full detail.

## Installers

- **Recommended for most users**: `AudioPilot-X.Y.Z-SelfContained-win-x64.zip`
- **Recommended for Windows on ARM**: `AudioPilot-X.Y.Z-SelfContained-win-arm64.zip`
- **MSI installers**: `AudioPilot-X.Y.Z-x64.msi` and `AudioPilot-X.Y.Z-arm64.msi` remain available as an alternate install path.

## Build Types

- **MSI**: per-user Windows installer with Start Menu and desktop shortcuts.
- **Framework-Dependent ZIP**: smaller download; requires the .NET 10 Desktop Runtime on Windows.
- **Self-Contained ZIP**: larger download; includes the .NET runtime and runs without a separate .NET install.

## SHA256 Checksums

See `SHA256SUMS.txt` in the release assets for the full checksum list covering all published MSI and ZIP downloads.
